da.hero_subtitle: Tag dit undervisning til næste niveau. For certificerede RYT-200 yogalærere.
da.expect_subtitle: 300-timer advanced training designet til at dybdegå, specialisere og transformere dit undervisning.
da.expect1_desc: Dybere forståelse af anatomisk præcision, avancerede justeringer, therapeutisk yoga og skadesforebyggelse.
da.expect2_desc: Vælg mellem moduler: Yin Yoga, Pre/Postnatal, Yoga Terapi, Ayurveda, Meditation & Mindfulness.
da.expect3_desc: Avanceret studium af Yoga Sutras, Tantra, Vedanta og hvordan man integrerer filosofi authentisk i klasser.
da.expect4_desc: Udvikl din unikke stemme, lær avanceret sequencing, workshop-design og hvordan man håndterer diverse studerende.
da.expect5_desc: Byg din yogabusiness: marketing, social media, retreat-planlægning og hvordan man skaler sin karriere.
da.expect6_desc: Fuld Yoga Alliance RYT-500 certificering. Internationalt anerkendt advanced credential.
da.modules_subtitle: Programmet er stadig under udvikling. Her er hvad vi planlægger:
da.mod1_desc: Fascia, nervesystem, endokrinsystem og advanced biomekanik. Praktisk anvendelse for injuries og specialiseringer.
da.mod2_desc: Yin-fundamentals, organ-meridianer, long holds, props og hvordan man designer Yin-sekvenser.
da.mod3_desc: Sikker undervisning for gravide og nyblevne mødre. Modifications, kontraindikationer og community-building.
da.mod4_desc: Therapeutiske tilgange til almindelige issues: rygsmerter, stress, angst, traumer og kroniske smerter.
da.mod5_desc: Doshas, sæsoner, livsstadier og hvordan man integrerer Ayurvedisk visdom i yogapraksis.
da.mod6_desc: Advanced åndedrætsteknikker, forskellige meditationsformer og hvordan man guider deep practices.
da.waitlist_subtitle: Vær blandt de første til at høre når vi lancerer. Du får early-bird pricing og priority-adgang.
da.form_hours_label: Hvor mange timer har du undervist? *
da.form_specializations_placeholder: F.eks. Yin Yoga, Pre/Postnatal, Yoga Terapi...
da.faq1_a: Vi forventer at lancere efterår 2026. Venteliste-medlemmer får besked først med early-bird pricing.
da.faq2_q: Kan jeg tage 300-timer uden RYT-200 fra Yoga Bible?
da.faq2_a: Ja! Du skal bare have en Yoga Alliance RYT-200 certificering fra hvilken som helst registreret skole. Vi gennemgår credentials ved ansøgning.
da.faq3_a: Vi designer flere formater - både et længere deltids-format (12-18 måneder) og et kompakt format (8-12 uger). Mere info kommer.
da.faq4_a: Prisen er endnu ikke fastsat, men forventes at være omkring 35.000-45.000 DKK. Venteliste-medlemmer får early-bird rabat.
da.faq5_q: Kan jeg tage enkelte moduler uden hele programmet?
da.faq5_a: Vi overvejer at tilbyde enkelte moduler som standalone kurser. Tilmeld ventelisten for opdateringer.
da.faq6_a: Programmet bliver primært in-person i København, men vi overvejer hybrid-elementer. Mere info kommer.
da.final_cta_text: Tilmeld venteliste nu og få early-bird adgang når vi lancerer.

en.hero_subtitle: Take your teaching to the next level. For certified RYT-200 yoga teachers.
en.expect_subtitle: 300-hour advanced training designed to deepen, specialize and transform your teaching.
en.expect1_desc: Deeper understanding of anatomical precision, advanced adjustments, therapeutic yoga and injury prevention.
en.expect2_desc: Choose from modules: Yin Yoga, Pre/Postnatal, Yoga Therapy, Ayurveda, Meditation & Mindfulness.
en.expect3_desc: Advanced study of Yoga Sutras, Tantra, Vedanta and how to authentically integrate philosophy into classes.
en.expect4_desc: Develop your unique voice, learn advanced sequencing, workshop design and how to handle diverse students.
en.expect5_desc: Build your yoga business: marketing, social media, retreat planning and how to scale your career.
en.expect6_desc: Full Yoga Alliance RYT-500 certification. Internationally recognized advanced credential.
en.modules_subtitle: The program is still in development. Here is what we are planning:
en.mod1_desc: Fascia, nervous system, endocrine system and advanced biomechanics. Practical application for injuries and specializations.
en.mod2_desc: Yin fundamentals, organ meridians, long holds, props and how to design Yin sequences.
en.mod3_desc: Safe teaching for pregnant and new mothers. Modifications, contraindications and community building.
en.mod4_desc: Therapeutic approaches to common issues: back pain, stress, anxiety, trauma and chronic pain.
en.mod5_desc: Doshas, seasons, life stages and how to integrate Ayurvedic wisdom into yoga practice.
en.mod6_desc: Advanced breathing techniques, various meditation forms and how to guide deep practices.
en.waitlist_subtitle: Be among the first to hear when we launch. You will get early-bird pricing and priority access.
en.form_hours_label: How many hours have you taught? *
en.form_specializations_placeholder: E.g. Yin Yoga, Pre/Postnatal, Yoga Therapy...
en.form_privacy: By signing up you accept our privacy policy.
en.faq1_a: We expect to launch in autumn 2026. Waitlist members will be notified first with early-bird pricing.
en.faq2_q: Can I take the 300-hour without an RYT-200 from Yoga Bible?
en.faq2_a: Yes! You just need a Yoga Alliance RYT-200 certification from any registered school. We review credentials upon application.
en.faq3_a: We are designing multiple formats - both a longer part-time format (12-18 months) and a compact format (8-12 weeks). More info coming soon.
en.faq4_a: The price has not been set yet, but is expected to be around 35,000-45,000 DKK. Waitlist members get an early-bird discount.
en.faq5_q: Can I take individual modules without the full program?
en.faq5_a: We are considering offering individual modules as standalone courses. Join the waitlist for updates.
en.faq6_a: The program will be primarily in-person in Copenhagen, but we are considering hybrid elements. More info coming soon.
en.final_cta_text: Join the waitlist now and get early-bird access when we launch.
